name: Destructotron
desc: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Destroy this card. This card must be the only Psychic monster you control to activate and to resolve this effect.
mnst_eff: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Destroy this card. This card must be the only Psychic monster you control to activate and to resolve this effect.
eff: You can pay 1000 LP, then target 1 Set Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target. Once per turn, during the End Phase: Destroy this card. This card must be the only Psychic monster you control to activate and to resolve this effect.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
